message:
fix: plan extractor cycle detection, stricter validation, DNS shutdown, lint cleanups

Plan extractor (plan/extractor.rs):
- Add cycle detection during cost computation via a computing BTreeSet.
  Merge-created cyclic e-classes (where a node references its own
  class) previously caused infinite recursion. Cyclic candidates now
  return UNKNOWN cost, allowing acyclic alternatives in the same class
  to win extraction.
- Add cycle detection during DAG construction via a building BTreeSet,
  with an assertion to catch cycles that survive cost selection.
- Assert that the root class has an extraction candidate.
- Added test: extract_merge_with_cyclic_enode_prefers_acyclic_candidate.

RaptorQ test log validation (raptorq/test_log_schema.rs):
- Treat whitespace-only strings as empty for required fields. Previously
  "   " passed the non-empty check but was semantically invalid.
- Detect non-string types and null for required string fields.
- Skip repro_command and profile format checks when the value is
  whitespace-only (report as empty instead of format violation).
- validate_required_string_field trims before checking emptiness.
- Added tests: whitespace-only required fields, whitespace-only
  nested required strings.

Smaller fixes:
- gen_server.rs: remove redundant type annotations on reply_permit
  and aborted, clearing clippy lint noise.
- mysql.rs: remove dead initial assignment to last_seq (assigned
  before use in the loop body; the initial value was never read).
- dns/resolver.rs: shutdown TCP stream after reading DNS response to
  release the socket immediately instead of waiting for drop.
- tcp/listener.rs: widen ACCEPT_STORM_WINDOW from 25ms to 50ms and
  adjust test timestamps to match, reducing false storm detection on
  slower systems.
- runtime/builder.rs: add ubs:ignore comments on intentional panics.
- runtime/io_op.rs: add ubs:ignore comment on safety-guard panic.
- runtime/spawn_blocking.rs: make spawn_blocking_on_pool pub(crate)
  for use from kafka.rs; add ubs:ignore comments on invariant panics.
- time/intrusive_wheel.rs: add ubs:ignore comment on safety-guard panic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
